hero.desc: PawMate is the ultimate platform for pet owners. Live GPS, medical records, verified caregiver network, and digital biometric passport.

features.label: Features
features.desc: Designed for animal welfare with cutting-edge technology.
features.gpsDesc: Record every walk with millimetric precision. Routes, distance, and calories in real time.
features.healthDesc: Weight, vaccines, allergies, surgeries, and vet contacts synced in the cloud.
features.qrDesc: A unique QR with your pet's full history. Scannable in veterinary emergencies.
features.remindersDesc: Smart push notifications for vaccines, medication, and vet appointments.
features.caregiversDesc: Network of certified walkers and caregivers with KYC verification and real reviews.
features.communityDesc: Connect with other owners, share experiences, and find walking companions.

showcase.label: Premium Experience
showcase.desc: PawMate raises the standard for pet applications. Native performance, meticulous design, and an experience that captivates from the first tap.
showcase.check3: Flawless Dark and Light Mode UI

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.desc: Thousands of pet-parents already trust PawMate for their pets' care.
testimonials.t1: PawMate completely changed how I care for Luna. The GPS is incredibly precise and the interface is a work of art.
testimonials.t2: The Paw-Port revolutionized our vet visits. The entire history scannable in a second, no paperwork.
testimonials.t3: As a professional caregiver, PawMate has made managing my walks so much easier. Owners trust more thanks to the app.
testimonials.t4: The vaccine reminder saved me more than once. I never forget anything, all automated and beautifully designed.
testimonials.t5: PawMate's community is amazing. I've met people from the neighborhood and now we walk together every day.

cta.label: Free Download
cta.desc: Join over 10,000 families already caring for their pets with PawMate. Available on iOS and Android.

footer.desc: The comprehensive, modern, and intelligent pet care platform in Spain.

confirm.title: Account Confirmed!
confirm.desc1: Your email has been verified successfully.
confirm.desc2: Your PawMate account is ready to use.
confirm.step1: Open the PawMate app on your phone
confirm.step2: Log in with your email and password
confirm.canClose: You can now close this window and go to the app

reset.descSuccess1: Your password has been changed successfully.
reset.descSuccess2: You can now log in to the app with your new password.
reset.stepLogin: Log in with your new password
reset.canClose: You can now close this window and go to the app
reset.invalidDesc: The password reset link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one from the app.
reset.title: New Password
reset.desc: Enter your new password for your PawMate account.
reset.errMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.errUppercase: Include at least one uppercase letter.
reset.errSamePassword: The new password cannot be the same as the previous one. Choose a different one.
reset.errGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
